final_prompt.prompt:
Create a full-screen brand splash ad for OPPO Find X9 Yta smartphone launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-exposure aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple iPhone launch campaign photography, Samsung Galaxy flagship hero shots, contemporary Chinese tech brand visual language (Xiaomi/Huawei flagship style); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen 9:16 vertical layout optimized for 1080×1920 display, visual impact prioritized
Subject: must include the OPPO Find X9 Yta smartphone as the hero product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium tech-launch atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a sleek premium surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO" brand name, "Find X9 Yta" product name
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 1080×1920 aspect ratio intent, brand-exposure priority, full-screen composition
Avoid:
